title: Corona (Corona-class frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Corona''-class frigate}}
{{Otheruses|Corona}}
'''''Corona''''' was a [[Corona-class frigate|''Corona''-class frigate]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

The lead ship of the ''Corona'' class, ''Corona'' was manufactured at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and patrolled the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].
